Spiked Collar  
 


Slot: NECK
AC: 3
STR: +3
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Spiked Collar

Slot: NECK
AC: 3
STR: +3
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:1 pp 2 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:6
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-27 03:00:28
Page Updated:Sun Apr 7th, 2013

Average Price: 10pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 11
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Blackburrow
NPC Name
a gnoll commander - Blackburrow
an elite gnoll guard


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Blackburrow


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
rated rare so I must be lucky
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2005 at 11:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362939651
309 posts
Killed one gnoll commander tonight while trying to do the task quest for the "gnollish guardian ring" (as a level 17 beastlord) and this dropped. It was better than the padded collar I was wearing. I think it is funny that I got an uprade in blackburrow :)
▲ Page top
collars out me arse
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2003 at 8:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786158388
Scholar
36 posts
I was soloing elites for a couple of levels and I have a glut of both spiked collars and studded leather collars. They seemed pretty good so I didn't want them to go to waste but now I have like eight of each. If you see me on Druzzil ro, send me a tell and I'll give you one!

Boronis, ranger of the 16th season.

ill sell one

if ur near the warrens to blackburrow send me a tell ill sell u a spiked collar...name is kaloft

kind souls
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2001 at 12:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764236019
99 posts
I guess I'm one of those kind souls reffered to by frank. I'm only lvl 14 but if I gotz any spiked or studded collars I always try to give them away before selling them. So if you need one of these and are in the area of blackburrow or qeynos send me a tell, names Rorge 14 Ranger.

Couldn't get one of these off a commander, but the second time I cleared teh Elite room, I got one off one of the Elite Guards.
▲ Page top
price check
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2000 at 2:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751048625
6 posts
How much is it to buy one of these, either from a merchant, or from a player
▲ Page top
RE: price check
QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2000 at 4:30 AM Rating: Good
Thalas
Scholar
27 posts
Could be about 10pp from a merchant. From a player? There's quite a few higher lvls with kind souls that will hand these out to newbies in Blackburrow. It says they're rare, but not really. It sells for about 1pp to merchants, so anyone trying to sell one for more than 2pp should be shot. They're really common.
▲ Page top
RE: price check
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2001 at 4:24 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
crappy i got mine for 30pp : (
▲ Page top
RE: price check
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2001 at 3:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750493276
3 posts
I agree with the previous message. In BlackBurrow our guild TORE through there in a single evening (mostly MID-levels) and came up with about 2 each. Enough to hand out to 20 players!
I would feel guilty selling it for more than 2-4pp.

Cheers,
Barg, Ceannad nam Tuath Na Sgiath
▲ Page top
RE: price check
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2001 at 4:27 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
in qeynos hills at the cottage they sell these colars for 39pp i have 2 i got off gnoll commanders adn i sell them for around 20pp if you dont believe me go to sayers cottage 75% of the time they have them they buy them for about 9gp and turn around and sell the exact same thing for 39pp
▲ Page top
RE: price check
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2001 at 12:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247845609
Scholar
73 posts
That just goes to show you how poorly NPCs will price items. I suppose it was geared this way to enforce a player economy basis, since buying and selling to vendors is just plain bad. Good idea, and all, but it would be nice to be able to get a decent price on an item regardless, since you can't always find somebody willing to pick up an item off you. In any case, I digress.

I'd have to agree with the previous posts, though. I'd say no more than 5pp would be reasonable, since you have to at least go to Blackburrow and kill the darn gnolls to get the item, but on the flip side it's not that hard to get, or very good.
▲ Page top
RE: price check
QuoteReply
# Sep 14 2001 at 9:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763501175
Scholar
71 posts
It doesnt show poor Ai or anything, the prices are set like that with a purpose, to encourage player trading.

Example:
Why does fine plate cost so much from a vendor? So you wont buy it from a vendor and get get it from a player who wants to blacksmith. These prices are designed to fuel the economy of EQ and to keep trading with other people a must.
▲ Page top
RE: price check
QuoteReply
# May 18 2001 at 6:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758588779
69 posts
at a merchant(with amiable+ faction), you can sell this for a little more than 1 pp. they sell this for around 32pp. i dont understand this IMMENSE difference...but most of the time i sell these to merchants. i can see how low lvl players will want to sell them for around 3, but being twinked all my EQ career, i didnt want to waste that time. they are quite easy to get, but that is at a higher level than when you would be in desperate need for it. i know most people(like me)just save up alot and use it as incentive for research materials(ie: bone chips, bat wings, rusty weapons and other low lvl loot). but if you are real cheap, you can take your lvl 5 character, make your way to the elite ledge and sit and wait until they get tired of looting theese P.
▲ Page top
